title: InventorySave
description: Save the current inventory and load it back later
body:
# Inventory Save

This plugin allows OPs to save / load inventories

Commands:

- `/inv list` - List saved inventories
- `/inv save <id>` - Save your current inventory as ID
- `/inv delete <id>` - Delete a saved inventory
- `/inv load <id> [player]` - Load a saved inventory (for yourself or for a player)

Permissions:

By default, only OPs can use the commands
